name: priceprovider.public:AnonymousUser
description: Anonymous user role - read public sales and rental prices only
permissionRefs: priceprovider.public:PriceRow[groupRefs isEmpty AND (priceType=='SALES_PRICE' OR priceType=='RENTAL_BASE_PRICE' OR priceType=='RENTAL_DAILY_RATE')]:read

name: priceprovider.public:PriceRowReader
description: Public price row reader - organization-scoped price access

name: priceprovider.public:PriceRowInspector
description: Public price row inspector - organization-scoped candidate inspection access
